character_assignments.consistency_anchor: shadowed marble silhouette, vertical split cracks with rust pigment, elongated frozen fingers, hollow eye sockets, pitted stone texture
character_assignments.expression: no facial movement—eye sockets empty, brow ridges slightly raised, fingers extended and splayed as if reaching upward but halted mid-motion
character_assignments.body_language: entire form fixed in stone, partial silhouette with hands and arms emerging from fractured tablet, no detectable movement, angle suggests longing or desperate extension without progress

scene_casts.composition_note: Fractured stone tablet in center frame, walls with jagged fractures compress the background into shadow

character_assignments.consistency_anchor: sunken angular face, slate blue-grey deep-set eyes, rough-woven slate robe, fractured golden medallion, pronounced hooked nose
character_assignments.expression: brows knitted downward, mouth strained wide open with cheeks stretched taut, jaw muscles rigid, eyes darting side to side with whites prominent in shadow
character_assignments.body_language: shoulders hunched forward, torso curved protectively over the action, left hand clenched at chest, right hand gripping robe near throat, head thrust slightly forward with chin tucked

scene_casts.composition_note: Shadowed Cronus in left foreground, cracked golden medallion on ground in midground with cave walls enclosing tightly
scene_casts.foreground_focus: the cracked edges of the fractured golden medallion

character_assignments.consistency_anchor: muted rust-brown large eyes, parchment skin with marble flecks, cropped slate hair with rust highlights, cracked golden medallion clasp, frayed parchment tunic
character_assignments.expression: eyes cast down and slightly to the left, brows faintly drawn together, lips pressed tight with lower lip protruding, jaw muscles tensed
character_assignments.body_language: body pressed into shadow, knees pulled close to chest, right hand gripping split medallion tightly, left arm wrapped protectively around legs, head tucked low
character_assignments.position_note: background right, partially obscured by fractured stone crack in foreground

scene_casts.composition_note: Low-angle fractured stone wall split by jagged crack in foreground right, hidden Zeus in shadowed background right
scene_casts.foreground_focus: the partially mended but still cracked family heirloom medallion

character_assignments.consistency_anchor: muted rust-brown large eyes, parchment skin with marble flecks, cropped slate hair with rust highlights, cracked golden medallion clasp, frayed parchment tunic
character_assignments.expression: eyes narrowed, lids lowered to half-mast, jaw set with lower teeth visible, nostrils flared, chin tilted upward
character_assignments.body_language: shoulders squared, feet apart and planted, right fist clutching shattered medallion at side, left hand hanging loose, head angled up toward fractured stone above
